 ║  I think in systems — not in lines of code.                  ║
 ╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
```

<div align="center">

## ⚙ RECENT SYSTEMS

</div>

<br>

<!-- Retro Table Header SVG -->
<div align="center">
<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="Table Header" width="600"/>
</div>

```
 ┌──────────────────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────┬──────────┐
 │  PROJECT         │  DESCRIPTION                                 │  LANG    │
 ├──────────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────┼──────────┤
 │  MATSIMU         │  Molecular dynamics engine                   │  C++17   │
 │  FinetuneYuno    │  Offline LLM fine-tuning on CPU              │  Python  │
 │  MrGraphy        │  Graph database visualizer                   │  Python  │
 │  MemGuard        │  Memory tracking & protection lib            │  C/C++   │
 └──────────────────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────┴──────────┘
```

<br>

---

<div align="center">

## 🔧 CORE ENGINES

</div>

<br>

<table>
<tr>
<td width="50%">

### MATSIMU
`C++17` · High-performance molecular dynamics  
→ [github.com/yunusemrejr/matsimu](https://github.com/yunusemrejr/matsimu)

</td>
<td width="50%">

### FinetuneYuno
`Python` · CPU-only offline LLM fine-tuning  
→ [github.com/yunusemrejr/FinetuneYuno](https://github.com/yunusemrejr/FinetuneYuno)

</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td width="50%">

### Neural Network from Scratch
`C++` · Minimal model engine  
→ [github.com/yunusemrejr/cpp-neural-net-from-scratch](https://github.com/yunusemrejr/cpp-neural-net-from-scratch)

</td>
<td width="50%">

### MemGuard
`C/C++` · Memory limiter + tracker  
→ [github.com/yunusemrejr/memguard](https://github.com/yunusemrejr/memguard)

</td>
</tr>
</table>

<br>

<!-- Retro Geometric Divider -->
<div align="center">
<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="Geometric Divider" width="600"/>
</div>

---

<div align="center">

## 🛠 INFRASTRUCTURE & TOOLING

</div>

<br>

<table>
<tr>
<td width="50%">

- **MrGraphy** — Graph viz & manager  
  → [github.com/yunusemrejr/MrGraphy](https://github.com/yunusemrejr/MrGraphy)

- **MemGuard** — Memory limiter + tracker  
  → [github.com/yunusemrejr/memguard](https://github.com/yunusemrejr/memguard)

</td>
<td width="50%">

- **KepServerEX Full Web Client**  
  → [github.com/yunusemrejr/KepServerEX-Full-Web-API-Client](https://github.com/yunusemrejr/KepServerEX-Full-Web-API-Client)

- **Anomaly Detection (C/C++)**  
  → [github.com/yunusemrejr/anomaly_detection_c_and_cpp](https://github.com/yunusemrejr/anomaly_detection_c_and_cpp)

</td>
</tr>
</table>

<br>

---

<div align="center">

## 🧠 SYSTEMS THINKING

</div>

<br>

```
  ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐  │
  │  │                                                         │  │
  │  │   ◆ Invariants before abstraction                       │  │
  │  │   ◆ Dataflow before interface                           │  │
  │  │   ◆ Observability from day one                          │  │
  │  │   ◆ Failure modes before deployment                     │  │
  │  │                                                         │  │
  │  │   Systems are long-term commitments — not quick hacks.  │  │
  │  │                                                         │  │
  │  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘  │
  └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

<br>
